mapper.select: update yy_channel_event_inbox set process_status = 'PROCESSING', update_time = now(), remark = 'worker claimed' where id in ( select id from yy_channel_event_inbox where channel_type = #{channelType} and del_flag = '0' and signature_valid = '1' and process_status in ('PENDING', 'RECEIVED', 'RETRY', 'FAILED') and (next_retry_time is null or next_retry_time <= now()) order by create_time asc nulls first, id asc limit #{limit} for update skip locked ) returning *
